title: eleocharis tiarata
intro: Eleocharis tiarata, also known as New Zealand spike-rush or Karamū, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis tiarata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
